prompt: Create a vertical photorealistic celebration portrait of a young Japanese woman in a soft, elegant party setting. She stands centered, smiling gently at the camera, with short dark brown bobbed hair and wispy bangs, natural glowing makeup, and warm brown eyes. She wears a high-neck long-sleeved ivory-white lace chiffon dress with delicate embroidery on the bodice, sheer sleeves, gathered cuffs, and a fitted waist. Her left hand is raised near shoulder height in a graceful pose, while her right hand holds long pale pink satin ribbon streamers with a small bow. The room is bright and airy with large window light, creamy white walls, soft gold accents, and a pastel celebration palette. Add exactly 5 visible balloons on the left side: 1 metallic gold balloon near the top, 2 pale pink translucent balloons, 1 clear balloon with gold confetti, and 1 smaller gold balloon lower left. Include a gold-framed side table at lower left with flowers, pastel sweets, and a small framed sign, plus a large floral arrangement at right with cream roses, pale pink roses, greenery, tiny string lights, and white decorative baubles. Scatter falling confetti in gold, white, blue, and pale pink throughout the scene, with subtle sparkles and a dreamy soft-focus bokeh glow. In the upper right, place an ornate cream cloud-shaped plaque outlined in gold with tiny star and dot decorations, a small gold heart at the upper left of the plaque, and a pink bow icon at the bottom. The plaque text must read exactly: “400人” in large coral-pink numerals and character, “フォロワー” below in dark gold Japanese lettering, and “ありがとう” below that in larger dark gold handwritten-style Japanese. Overall style: high-end Japanese social media milestone thank-you photo, romantic, clean, luminous, pastel pink and gold, shallow depth of field, realistic skin texture, polished magazine photography. Avoid extra text, logos, watermarks, distorted hands, or unreadable lettering.
promptEn: Create a vertical photorealistic celebration portrait of a young Japanese woman in a soft, elegant party setting. She stands centered, smiling gently at the camera, with short dark brown bobbed hair and wispy bangs, natural glowing makeup, and warm brown eyes. She wears a high-neck long-sleeved ivory-white lace chiffon dress with delicate embroidery on the bodice, sheer sleeves, gathered cuffs, and a fitted waist. Her left hand is raised near shoulder height in a graceful pose, while her right hand holds long pale pink satin ribbon streamers with a small bow. The room is bright and airy with large window light, creamy white walls, soft gold accents, and a pastel celebration palette. Add exactly 5 visible balloons on the left side: 1 metallic gold balloon near the top, 2 pale pink translucent balloons, 1 clear balloon with gold confetti, and 1 smaller gold balloon lower left. Include a gold-framed side table at lower left with flowers, pastel sweets, and a small framed sign, plus a large floral arrangement at right with cream roses, pale pink roses, greenery, tiny string lights, and white decorative baubles. Scatter falling confetti in gold, white, blue, and pale pink throughout the scene, with subtle sparkles and a dreamy soft-focus bokeh glow. In the upper right, place an ornate cream cloud-shaped plaque outlined in gold with tiny star and dot decorations, a small gold heart at the upper left of the plaque, and a pink bow icon at the bottom. The plaque text must read exactly: “400人” in large coral-pink numerals and character, “フォロワー” below in dark gold Japanese lettering, and “ありがとう” below that in larger dark gold handwritten-style Japanese. Avoid extra text, logos, watermarks, distorted hands, or unreadable lettering.
promptZh: 创作一张竖构图、照片级逼真的庆祝肖像，背景为柔和优雅的派对场景。一位年轻的日本女性站在画面中央，对着镜头温柔微笑，留着深棕色短波波头和空气刘海，妆容自然透亮，拥有一双温暖的棕色眼睛。她身穿高领长袖象牙白蕾丝雪纺连衣裙，胸前饰有精致刺绣，袖口透明且有褶皱，腰部修身。她的左手抬至肩部附近，姿态优雅，右手拿着长长的淡粉色缎带，系着一个小蝴蝶结。房间明亮通风，有大窗户采光，墙壁呈奶油白色，点缀着柔和的金色，整体采用淡雅的庆祝色调。在左侧添加 5 个可见气球：顶部附近 1 个金属金色气球，2 个淡粉色半透明气球，1 个装有金色纸屑的透明气球，以及左下方 1 个较小的金色气球。左下方放置一张金色边框的边桌，上面摆放着鲜花、淡雅甜点和一个小相框标牌；右侧放置一个大型花艺装饰，包含奶油色玫瑰、淡粉色玫瑰、绿植、细小的串灯和白色装饰球。场景中散落着金色、白色、蓝色和淡粉色的纸屑，伴有微妙的闪光和梦幻般的柔焦光斑。在右上角，放置一个华丽的奶油色云朵状牌匾，边缘镶金，饰有小星星和圆点，牌匾左上角有一个金色小爱心，底部有一个粉色蝴蝶结图标。牌匾文字必须准确显示为：“400人”（使用大号珊瑚粉色数字和字符），下方为深金色日文字体“フォロワー”，再下方为更大号的深金色手写风格日文“ありがとう”。整体风格：高端日系社交媒体里程碑感谢照，浪漫、简洁、明亮，淡粉色与金色调，浅景深，真实的皮肤质感，精致的杂志摄影感。避免出现多余文字、Logo、水印、手部畸形或无法辨认的字迹。
